Title: Verify API endpoint communication
Preconditions: The API is running and accessible.
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to the API endpoint.
2. Verify the response status code is 200 (OK).
3. Verify the response body contains expected data.
Expected Result: The API responds with a 200 status code and expected data.

Title: Verify API endpoint error handling
Preconditions: The API is running and accessible.
Test Steps:
1. Send an invalid request to the API endpoint.
2. Verify the response status code is 400 (Bad Request).
3. Verify the response body contains an error message.
Expected Result: The API responds with a 400 status code and an error message.

Title: Verify user interface pages
Preconditions: The application is running and accessible.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main page of the application.
2. Verify all expected elements are present.
3. Click on various links and buttons to navigate through the application.
4. Verify all expected pages are accessible.
Expected Result: The user can navigate through the application, and all expected pages and elements are present.

Title: Verify data management and control
Preconditions: The API is running and accessible, and the database is populated with test data.
Test Data: Valid data for creating, updating, and deleting records.
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to create a new record using valid data.
2. Verify the record is created in the database.
3. Send a request to update an existing record using valid data.
4. Verify the record is updated in the database.
5. Send a request to delete a record.
6. Verify the record is deleted from the database.
Expected Result: The API can create, update, and delete records in the database as expected.

Title: Verify data validation
Preconditions: The API is running and accessible, and the database is populated with test data.
Test Data: Invalid data for creating, updating, and deleting records.
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to create a new record using invalid data.
2. Verify the API responds with an error message.
3. Send a request to update an existing record using invalid data.
4. Verify the API responds with an error message.
5. Send a request to delete a record using invalid data.
6. Verify the API responds with an error message.
Expected Result: The API validates data before creating, updating, and deleting records, and responds with error messages for invalid data.

Title: Verify database interaction
Preconditions: The API is running and accessible, and the database is populated with test data.
Test Data: Valid data for creating, updating, and deleting records.
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to create a new record using valid data.
2. Verify the record is created in the database.
3. Send a request to update an existing record using valid data.
4. Verify the record is updated in the database.
5. Send a request to delete a record.
6. Verify the record is deleted from the database.
Expected Result: The API can interact with the MySQL database to create, update, and delete records as expected.

Title: Verify content delivery
Preconditions: The API is running and accessible, and Bunny.io is configured correctly.
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to deliver content using valid data.
2. Verify the content is delivered through Bunny.io.
Expected Result: The API can deliver content through Bunny.io as expected.

Title: Verify real-time communication
Preconditions: The API is running and accessible, and the real-time communication service is configured correctly.
Test Data: Valid data for sending and receiving messages.
Test Steps:
1. Send a message using valid data.
2. Verify the message is received in real-time.
3. Send a response message.
4. Verify the response message is received in real-time.
Expected Result: The API can send and receive messages in real-time as expected.

Title: Verify push notifications
Preconditions: The API is running and accessible, and the push notifications system is configured correctly.
Test Data: Valid data for sending push notifications.
Test Steps:
1. Send a push notification using valid data.
2. Verify the push notification is received on the target device.
Expected Result: The API can send push notifications to target devices as expected.

Title: Verify background jobs
Preconditions: The API is running and accessible, and background jobs are configured correctly.
Test Data: Valid data for triggering background jobs.
Test Steps:
1. Trigger a background job using valid data.
2. Verify the job is executed in the background.
3. Verify the job completes successfully.
Expected Result: The API can trigger and execute background jobs as expected.

Title: Verify tag signal interaction
Preconditions: The API is running and accessible, and tag signals are configured correctly.
Test Data: Valid data for triggering tag signals.
Test Steps:
1. Trigger a tag signal using valid data.
2. Verify the tag signal is received and processed.
Expected Result: The API can trigger and process tag signals as expected.
